description:
Deletes given control. The control has to be created either by script with [[ctrlCreate]] or to have {{hl|deletable}} property in config set to 1. Use [[ctrlShow]] [[false]] and [[ctrlEnable]] [[false]] to disable controls that cannot be deleted. Returns [[Boolean]] indicating  whether the deletion was successful.
{{Feature|warning|Using [[ctrlDelete]] in a [[User_Interface_Event_Handlers|UI eventhandler]] called by the to be deleted control will crash the game! This also happens when a controls group is deleted that contains the "calling" control.}}
name: ctrlDelete
